official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the block_update packet id.
Official binary source for constructing, decoding, and writing the block_update body without initialized world state.
Official binary source for the position and block-state body shape.
Official binary source for writing and dispatch-decoding the full Play clientbound block_update frame.

field_notes.fixture: Uses the official public constructor and STREAM_CODEC with a context-free BlockPos value and built-in Blocks.STONE.defaultBlockState(). It requires bootstrapped built-in block state registry but no initialized Level or game state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound block_update packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official BlockPos and built-in stone default block-state fixture only; do not infer world/chunk state, block update semantics, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
